known_baseline_facts.existing_runtime_scope: basic agent runtime with agent run and metrics endpoints

phase_0_gate.condition: Phase 1 may begin only as additive constitutional contract files; no existing runtime may be assumed beyond this manifest.
phase_0_gate.fail_closed_rule: If any inspected blob SHA differs before Phase 1, stop and regenerate Phase 0 baseline lock.

drift_risks.risk: Repository is small and does not yet contain the canonical constitutional runtime.
drift_risks.closure: Baseline explicitly marks constitutional runtime as absent; later phases must add it rather than refactor assumed code.

drift_risks.risk: Remote connector inspection cannot execute local commands or enumerate every file with a full git tree in this session.
drift_risks.closure: Manifest locks all files that were directly fetched and inspected; any later local execution must reconcile full tree before mutation.

drift_risks.risk: Existing /api/agents/run endpoint can execute agent work and accepts caller tool options.
drift_risks.closure: No mutation performed in Phase 0; Phase 1+ must wrap governed execution boundaries before business mutations are introduced.

remaining_blockers: Remote CI/typecheck/test execution was not available through the GitHub connector in this session.
Full recursive tree enumeration was unavailable through the connector; only directly fetched files are locked here.
